title: BlackRock rips page from hedge fund playbook, applies it to exchange-traded funds
summary: BlackRock's Jeffrey Rosenberg has a leading role in the firm's liquid alt ETFs — which use a long-short strategy in ETF wrappers.

title: Chinese Refiners Buy Iranian Crude at Premium
summary: Chinese independent refiners are buying Iranian crude at a premium to Brent crude, for the first time in years, Reuters has reported, noting prices were driven higher by anticipated increases in Indian purchases of Iranian oil.
